Our Story

Where Beauty
Meets Artistry

Saundaryam is a sanctuary of refined beauty nestled in the heart of Greater Noida's Delta City Centre. Every visit is a transformative experience — a moment of pure indulgence where skilled hands, premium products, and personalised care come together to reveal your most radiant self.

M
Founder & Director Mamta Sharma

Beauty Artist · Bridal Specialist

Our Philosophy

Crafted for Every Woman

"Saundaryam" — the Sanskrit word for absolute beauty — is more than a name. It is a promise. We don't just style; we celebrate the innate elegance within every individual.

Bridal Expert Skin Care Hair Studio Nail Art Premium Products Personalised Care

"Every woman deserves to feel like a queen — not just on her wedding day, but every single day she walks through our doors."

— Mamta Sharma, Founder
What We Offer

Our Signature Services

From bridal transformations to everyday glow — every service is delivered with passion and precision.

01

Bridal Makeup

Bespoke bridal looks crafted to perfection — from subtle elegance to opulent grandeur. HD, Airbrush & traditional options available.

Signature Service
02

Skin Treatments

Advanced facials, clean-ups, de-tans, bleach, glow therapies and D-Tan packs using premium dermatologist-approved products.

Most Popular
03

Hair Styling & Colour

Cuts, global colours, highlights, balayage, keratin treatments, smoothening, and creative styling from seasoned hair artists.

Premium
04

Manicure & Pedicure

Luxurious nail care, gel extensions, nail art and spa pedicures that leave your hands and feet impeccably groomed.

Trending
05

Threading & Waxing

Precise eyebrow shaping, upper lip threading and full-body waxing with premium Rica & chocolate wax for smooth results.

Quick Service
06

Party & Occasion Makeup

Bold, flawless glam for every celebration — cocktail parties, festivals, engagements, sangeet nights and beyond.

On Demand
07

Mehendi

Traditional and contemporary bridal Mehendi designs applied by skilled artists — for bridal, festive and casual occasions.

Bridal Special
08

Pre-Bridal Packages

Customised multi-session packages for brides-to-be including skin prep, hair care, body polishing and full glow-up treatments.

Best Value
09

Hair Spa & Treatments

Nourishing hair spa, protein treatments, scalp therapies and hair masks using professional salon-grade products for lustrous locks.

Relaxing
Special Packages

Why Choose Us

The Saundaryam
Difference

01

Expert & Experienced Artists

Led by founder Mamta Sharma, our team brings years of expertise in bridal artistry, skin care, and hair styling for all skin tones and hair types.

02

Premium Products Only

We use trusted, professional-grade brands — MAC, Kérastase, Rica, Schwarzkopf and more — ensuring quality and safety in every treatment.

03

Hygienic & Welcoming Space

Our studio maintains the highest hygiene standards with single-use tools, sanitised stations, and a clean, comfortable environment.

04

Personalised for Every Client

We take time to understand your preferences, skin type, and look goals before every appointment — no two clients are treated the same.

"Beauty is not about looking like someone else — it's about the most radiant version of you."

— Mamta Sharma · Founder, Saundaryam

Your Journey With Us

01

Book an Appointment

04

Leave feeling transformed, confident and beautiful. We're only done when you love what you see.

FAQ

Common Questions

Have more questions? Call or WhatsApp us anytime.

Ask on WhatsApp
Do I need to book an appointment in advance? +
While walk-ins are always welcome, we recommend booking an appointment in advance — especially for bridal, pre-bridal and party makeup services — to ensure your preferred time slot is available.
What are your working hours? +
We are open all days of the week — Monday through Sunday — from 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM. No day off, so you can visit us any time that's convenient for you.
Do you offer home services / at-home bridal makeup? +
Yes! We do offer home visits for bridal and occasion makeup within Greater Noida. Please call or WhatsApp us with your location and date to check availability and charges.
What products do you use? +
We use only professional, salon-grade and dermatologist-trusted brands including MAC, Kérastase, Schwarzkopf, L'Oréal Professionnel, Rica, and more. Product safety and quality are our top priorities.
How early should I book my bridal appointment? +
We recommend booking bridal and pre-bridal packages at least 2–4 weeks in advance, especially during wedding seasons (Oct–Feb and April–June) as slots fill up quickly.
Do you offer trial makeup sessions? +
Absolutely! We offer bridal trial sessions where you can preview your makeup look before the wedding day. This helps us understand your preferences and finalize the perfect look for your big day.
